detail: reinitialized local-only autoresearch state in fresh environment
covered git long-form destructive flags and GitHub CLI credential path sensitivity
covered git branch/push destructive parity and clean dry-run short-flag handling
stripped more git global option forms before subcommand classification and override lookup
covered git config-env and exec-path global-option stripping without weakening fail-closed handling
covered git icase-pathspecs global-flag stripping so hidden subcommands classify correctly
stripped git no-lazy-fetch global flag so later subcommands still classify correctly
failed closed on malformed git -c and --config-env globals
expanded regression coverage for stripped git globals and valid -c override handling
scan found stdout-capturing &> and &>> redirects skipped literal content inspection for echo/printf payloads
treat &> like stdout for redirect content scans and preserve leading-dash printf literals during extraction
kept stdout-capturing redirect content inspection for &> / &>> with leading-dash printf payloads (commit e068e11)
scan found heredoc-backed writes via cat skipped redirect content inspection for secret and destructive payloads inside the project
extract heredoc bodies from raw stages and feed them into redirect content scanning while preserving existing path checks
kept heredoc redirect content inspection for cat > file <<'EOF' and cat <<'EOF' > file secret/destructive writes
scan found flagged and glued here-string writes like cat -n<<<, cat --<<<, and bash -s <<< skipped redirect content inspection or fell back to unknown writes inside the project
split glued here-string operators during decomposition and let shell-wrapper unwraps find <<< after leading flags so redirect literal scans still inspect payloads
kept flagged and glued here-string redirect content inspection for cat -n<<< / --<<< and bash -s / --noprofile -s<<< secret or destructive writes
